branches.condition: CONC=DMDE OR CONC=ICME OR CONC=MEDC OR CONC=MWFA OR CONC=PERM OR CONC=COMM OR CONC=ENGL OR CONC=VART

notes: New Media Studies majors need to select a concentration from
the following: Communication, English, Media Computation,
Performance Media, or Visual Arts.
Within the Interdisciplinary Course options, you will select two
courses from categories 1 through 5 for a total of four classes,
two in each category. You will then need to select a fifth course
from a third category. IMPORTANT NOTE:  Courses will be placed
in this area as they are taken, but may not apply to the desired
category until all five courses have been taken and/or registered
for.  If you want to see how your planned courses apply, you may
use the Look Ahead feature to see how your audit will look.
